HGSS.088.0000:
Kurt: Hey there, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
The guard up top took off when
I shouted at him.\f
But then I took a tumble down the well.\f
I slammed down hard on my back,
so I can’t move.\f
Rats! If I were fit, my Pokémon
would’ve punished them...\f
Ah, it can’t be helped.\f
[0103,0000,0000], show them how gutsy
you are in my place!
